title: FUGUEオーケストレーションについて、Orchestratorはどうなっているか調べて
summary_text:
```mermaid flowchart TD A[GitHub Issue
labels: fugue-task,tutti] --> B[fugue-tutti-caller.yml] A2[workflow_dispatch] --> B B --> B1[ctx
issue解析・翻訳ゲート・リスク推定] B1 --> B2{subscription strict実行可?} B2 -- No --> B3[Issueへ pauseコメント
processing解除] B2 -- Yes --> C[fugue-tutti-router.yml
(reusable workflow)] C --> C1[prepare
trust判定・runner在否判定] C1 --> C2[resolve-orchestrator
main/assist解決・lane matrix生成] C2 --> D{execution_profile} D -- subscription-paused --> D1[pause-subscription
安全停止] D -- subscription-strict --> E[run-agents] D -- api-continuity/api-standard --> E E --> E1{runs-on} E1 -- strict --> E2[self-hosted + required label
FUGUE_SUBSCRIPTION_RUNNER_LABEL] E1 -- continuity/api --> E3[ubuntu-latest] C2 --> Q[subscription-queue-guard
stall/未展開lane監視] Q -->|異常| Q1[Issueへ pauseコメント
run cancel] E --> F[integrate
重み付き2/3合議 + HIGH risk veto] F --> G[finalize
completed / needs-review / needs-human] H[fugue-orchestrator-canary.yml] --> C I[fugue-status.yml] --> J[運用状態レポート投稿] ``` ```mermaid stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> SubscriptionStrict: engine=subscription & labeled self-hosted online [*] --> SubscriptionPaused: engine=subscription & offline_policy=hold & labeled runner offline [*] --> ApiContinuity: engine=subscription & offline_policy=continuity [*] --> ApiStandard: engine=api/harness SubscriptionStrict --> QueueGuardPause: run-agents stalled/未展開 QueueGuardPause --> SubscriptionPaused: issue pause + cancel SubscriptionStrict --> Integrated ApiContinuity --> Integrated ApiStandard --> Integrated SubscriptionPaused --> [*] Integrated --> Finalized Finalized --> [*] ``` 必要なら次に、これをそのまま `docs/architecture.md` に清書してコミットします。
